overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game showing a character in futuristic armor exploring a warmly lit, industrial-style apartment interior. The character moves through the living space, interacts with a device on a desk, and approaches an exit where an NPC stands.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial apartment living area with dining space

events.description: character stops at the wooden desk and activates a glowing handheld device

agents.ego_description: walking to the back desk and interacting with a datapad or handheld device that emits blue light

wooden desk against the back wall with various items on surface
large circular mirror mounted on wall above the desk
classical-style framed painting depicting a figure

exposed ventilation pipes and conduits running across the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a warmly lit industrial apartment, approaching a wooden desk against the back wall. The room features a round dining table with white chairs, a metal shelving unit, and exposed pipes on the ceiling. The character stops at the desk to interact with a glowing device.

scene_state.functional_zone: apartment side area near window and exit

events.description: character turns away from the desk and begins walking back toward the room entrance

agents.ego_description: turning left and walking back toward the front of the room past the dining area

entered.detail: tall standing lamp with warm glowing light
large window with horizontal blinds showing exterior lights
narrow wooden table against the left wall with items on top

segments.scene_description: The character turns away from the back desk and walks toward the left side of the room, passing a floor lamp and a window with blinds. The dining table moves to the right side of the frame as the character heads toward the room's entrance area.

scene_state.functional_zone: apartment entryway leading to external corridor

events.description: approaching the exit doorway leading to an external corridor

agents.ego_description: walking toward the exit doorway and passing by a standing NPC in a red shirt

notable_agents.action: NPC in red shirt and gray pants standing near the doorway, observing the player character

entered.detail: open doorway with metal frame leading to a lit corridor beyond
small wooden stand or lectern near the doorway
visible hallway with lighting and distant figures through the doorway

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the apartment exit where an NPC in a red shirt stands near a wooden podium. The doorway reveals a lit corridor beyond as the character moves to exit the room, leaving the living area behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a warmly lit industrial apartment that transitions from a focused interaction at a desk to an exit into a bright corridor. It begins with the character approaching a wooden desk against the back wall, passing a round dining table and exposed ceiling pipes to interact with a glowing device. As the character turns away from the desk, the camera tracks toward the left side of the room, gliding past a floor lamp and a window with blinds while the dining area recedes to the right. The scene then shifts toward the apartment's entrance, moving past the interior living space to approach an NPC in a red shirt standing by a wooden podium. Finally, the camera follows the character through the doorway and into a lit corridor, leaving the industrial apartment behind.
